title: Hexavalent Distribution
description: A probability distribution over hexavalent truth values (T/P/U/D/F/C). Values must sum to 1.0 (+-0.01 tolerance). Extends fuzzy-distribution with Probable and Doubtful values.

T.description: Membership degree for True (verified with evidence)

P.description: Membership degree for Probable (evidence leans true, not yet verified)

D.description: Membership degree for Doubtful (evidence leans false, not yet refuted)

F.description: Membership degree for False (refuted with evidence)
